companies.name: SimDaaS Autonomy Pvt. Ltd.
companies.description: Founded as an incubate at IIT Kanpur. Simulation platform for training and testing of autonomous systems. Received seed funding at ₹32cr post-money valuation in January 2025.

companies.name: Geokno India Pvt. Ltd.
companies.description: The FIRST faculty company at IIT Kanpur. Developed 4 products and completed 18 projects during incubation. Awarded 'Best Start up company in ICT in 2011' by ISBA. Graduated with majority equity acquisition by GMR.

companies.name: AUS Pvt. Ltd.
companies.description: Mentoring this company incubated at IIT Kanpur. Developed indigenous UAV and photogrammetric based mapping system. Received funding in first round.

companies.name: Nebula Cloud by GVB Geomatics
companies.description: Mentoring the company for design of product and reaching the market since October 2021.
